gold.rationale: 文本前半关于以色列境内警报与拦截的描述可作为一般新闻叙述成立，但将“迪戈加西亚基地遇袭”绑定为“同一轮行动”并用经过叠加标注的图片作为佐证，造成时间地点语境错置与图文归属不一致。

atomic_points.post_summary: 该帖文声称以色列军方通报侦测到伊朗于3月21日晚发射弹道导弹，以色列多地启动防空拦截并出现爆炸声及伤亡，同时网传伊朗向迪戈加西亚基地发射导弹且相关话题登上热搜。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 【快讯】以色列军方在当地时间3月21日晚通报称，侦测到伊朗发射弹道导弹。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 有消息称，伊朗还向印度洋方向的迪戈加西亚（Diego Garcia）空军基地发射两枚中程弹道导弹，其中一枚被拦截，另一枚在飞行途中失效；网传帖文配图并标注该地为“B-2 base under missile attack”。

atoms: image_1 shows a screenshot of an ABC News tweet with the handle @ABC.
image_1 contains English text discussing the risk of a prolonged oil shock to the U.S. economy.
image_1 includes a Google Translate overlay providing a Chinese translation of the tweet text.
image_1 displays a photograph of an industrial facility with large plumes of smoke rising.
image_1 has a black banner at the bottom of the photo with the text 'Attacks on Middle East energy sites deepen threat to US economy, analysts say'.
image_1 shows a watermark '@小凡好摄' in the bottom right corner.
image_2 shows a close-up of a missile nose cone against a grey sky.
image_2 has a large Chinese headline overlay: '美媒：伊朗导弹袭击 3800公里外美英印度洋基地'.
image_2 contains a location tag 'Diego Garcia Air Base' in the top left corner.
image_2 includes a text block describing a report from the Wall Street Journal about Iran firing missiles at Diego Garcia.
image_2 displays a 'NEWS UPDATE' banner at the bottom with scrolling text.
image_2 shows a date stamp 'Mar 21, 2026 (local)' in the bottom right corner.
image_2 features a small map inset showing the location of Diego Garcia in the Indian Ocean.
image_2 has a '资料画面' (file footage) label in the top right.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A screenshot of a social media post from ABC News. The post discusses the economic impact of an oil shock. Below the text is a photo of an oil refinery or industrial site emitting thick smoke. A black caption bar at the bottom of the photo reads 'Attacks on Middle East energy sites deepen threat to US economy, analysts say'. A Chinese translation overlay is visible.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: ABC News @ABC | The prospect of a prolonged oil shock ratchets up the risk faced by the U.S. economy... | 由 Google 翻译自 英语 | 分析人士表示，石油危机长期持续的前景加剧了美国经济面临的风险... | Attacks on Middle East energy sites deepen threat to US economy, analysts say | @小凡好摄
visible_overlays_annotations: Black caption bar with white text
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows an ABC News post about oil shocks and Middle East energy sites, which aligns with the post's context of Middle East conflict but focuses on economic impact rather than the specific missile attack described in the text.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A news-style graphic featuring a close-up of a missile tip. Large Chinese text overlays the top, claiming US media reports of an Iranian missile attack on a US-UK base in the Indian Ocean. A text block at the bottom details a Wall Street Journal report about missiles fired at Diego Garcia. A date stamp reads 'Mar 21, 2026'. A small map shows Diego Garcia's location.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: Diego Garcia Air Base | 美媒：伊朗导弹袭击 3800公里外美英印度洋基地 | 资料画面 | 当地时间3月20日，据美国《华尔街日报》援引多位美国官员消息报道，伊朗向位于印度洋中部的美英联合军事基地迪戈加西亚岛发射了两枚中程弹道导弹。 | NEWS UPDATE | 美媒报道：伊朗导弹击中迪戈加西亚基地... | Mar 21, 2026 (local) | Diego Garcia
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image visually supports the post's claim about missiles targeting Diego Garcia, explicitly citing the Wall Street Journal and showing a date of March 21, 2026.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post claims this image shows night-time air defense interception scenes in Israel, specifically missile trails and interception fire.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: The image shows a screenshot of an ABC News tweet featuring a photo of a daytime industrial facility (likely an oil refinery) with large plumes of smoke, and a caption about attacks on Middle East energy sites.
cross_modal_findings.explicit_caption_or_overlay: ABC News @ABC ... Attacks on Middle East energy sites deepen threat to US economy, analysts say
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The text claims the image shows night-time interception fire in Israel, but the image actually shows a daytime industrial fire/smoke plume from an ABC News tweet about oil shocks, which is a complete mismatch in time, content, and context.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post claims this image is a social media screenshot showing a missile launch at Diego Garcia Air Base with specific text overlays.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: The image shows a missile launch with a video play button overlay, Chinese text overlays mentioning 'Iran missile attack' and 'Diego Garcia', and a date stamp of 'Mar 21, 2026'.
cross_modal_findings.explicit_caption_or_overlay: 美媒：伊朗导弹袭击 3800公里外美英印度洋基地 ... Diego Garcia Air Base ... Mar 21, 2026 (local)
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The text describes the image as a social media screenshot with English overlays like 'B-2 base under missile attack', while the image actually contains Chinese overlays and a date of 2026, showing a mismatch in the specific visual details described.

retrieved_evidence.text:
快讯：伊朗向迪戈加西亚空军基地发射了两枚中程弹道导弹，该基地距离伊朗约 4000 公里，那里驻有美军B-2 幽灵轰炸机。

其中一枚导弹被拦截，而另一枚在飞行途中失效——《华尔街日报》

#中东土豪5分钟打赏团播100万##海外新鲜事# #伊朗将实施前所未有的强力打击##以色列全国多地遭导弹袭击# ​​​
以色列国防军近日通报称，伊朗在夜间向以色列方向发射多枚弹道导弹，引发特拉维夫等多地防空警报拉响。根据官方与当地民众的描述，当晚多个城市上空可以看到密集的防空火力和拦截弹尾迹，以及紧急警报启动后城市局部灯火通明的紧张场景。以军发言人强调，现有防空和反导系统在相关拦截行动中发挥了核心作用，并将此次来袭置于伊朗与以色列紧张对抗的大背景下加以说明。
针对伊朗据称向以色列发射弹道导弹的同一轮动向，社交平台上随后出现了将战地火光与导弹拦截场面配上图文标注的内容，有帖子将地点标注为位于印度洋的美军迪戈加西亚基地。相关发布通常叠加醒目的英文标题条和位置框，并附小型地图插图指示迪戈加西亚的海域方位，据称用于展示所谓远程打击现场。根据多名观察人士介绍，此类内容借助地名标签和地图元素放大了外界对美军海外基地在当前伊朗与以色列紧张局势中可能遭到牵连的联想。
据以色列国防部门近日向媒体通报的说法，以方称伊朗在夜间向以境内目标发射多枚弹道导弹，以色列多地随后拉响防空警报。以军方面表示，防空系统已对来袭目标进行拦截处置，具体拦截比例及落点情况仍在评估之中。相关人员指出，部分地区一度传出爆炸声和疑似碎片坠落报告，目前尚无统一官方统计数据。伊朗方面暂未就此轮行动细节发表全面说明，后续信息有待各方进一步披露。

呵呵，特朗普看到，又要说是“假新闻”！[允悲]
#美伊以冲突##以色列称伊朗发射弹道导弹##伊朗称击中以军F16战机##黄媒不会说的真相# ​​​
据多家互联网监测机构本周统计，围绕中东地区最新军事动向的相关话题在多家社交平台上迅速走红，其中涉及伊朗被指发射导弹、以色列多地拉响防空警报等内容的标签一度登上热门话题榜前列。用户在平台上转发现场画面、官方通报节选以及各类评论观点，使得讨论热度在短时间内持续攀升。观察人士指出，由于信息来源复杂，相关内容呈现出高度碎片化特点，具体情况仍以后续权威渠道进一步说明为准。
在伊朗与以色列近期相互指责的背景下，中东地区局势再度趋于紧张。据多国外交渠道消息，自有关导弹与防空警报的报道出现后，相关各方密集发表声明，相互指控对方破坏地区稳定，强调自身行动属于防御性质或回应挑衅。阿拉伯国家联盟及联合国有关机构据称正密切关注事态发展，呼吁各方保持克制，避免局势进一步升级。有分析人士表示，目前各方公开表态语气强硬，后续走向仍存在较大不确定性。

《经济学人》：美国总统赢得连任时曾誓言“上任第一天”就避免战争并降低物价。然而，他违背了这两项承诺，正在失去支持。
补充：为了以色列，特朗普打造的MAGA正在内部撕裂中...........
#美伊以冲突##以色列称伊朗发射弹道导弹##伊朗称击中以军F16战机##黄媒不会说的真相# ​​​

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the core event of Iranian missile strikes on Israel and Diego Garcia as per evidence, but Image 1 is semantically inconsistent with the text's claim of showing interception footage, and the post slightly inflates the certainty of the Diego Garcia attack details.
text_analysis.c1_evidence: The post text claims Image 1 shows 'Israeli domestic night air defense interception related scenes: night sky visible suspected missile trails and interception fire', but the image description for image_1 (01_img_1.jpg) identifies it as 'A screenshot of a social media post from ABC News... discussing the economic impact of an oil shock' with a photo of an 'oil refinery... emitting thick smoke', which is a complete semantic mismatch.
c1_problematic_subclaims: Image 1 is presented as visual evidence of the Israeli air defense interception of Iranian ballistic missiles on the night of March 21
text_analysis.global_assessment: The text is largely factually grounded in the retrieved evidence regarding the missile strikes, but it contains a significant cross-modal error where Image 1 is misidentified as interception footage when it is actually an unrelated economic news screenshot.

images.scene_description: The image is a screenshot of a social media post from ABC News. It features a photograph of a large industrial facility, likely an oil refinery, with massive plumes of smoke rising from it. There is a black caption bar at the bottom of the photo.
images.ocr_text: ABC News @ABC The prospect of a prolonged oil shock ratchets up the risk faced by the U.S. economy, analysts say, threatening a blow for households already bedeviled by elevated inflation and a near-frozen labor market. 由 Google 翻译自 英语 分析人士表示，石油危机长期持续的前景加剧了美国经济面临的风险，可能会对已经饱受高通胀和近乎冻结的劳动力市场困扰的家庭造成打击。 Attacks on Middle East energy sites deepen threat to US economy, analysts say
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite screenshot of a social media post containing a news photo, overlaid with a Google translation block and a news ticker caption, which constitutes visual editing/overlay.
images.c_evidence: The post claims the image shows 'night air defense interception' and 'missile trails' in Israel, but the image actually depicts a daytime industrial fire/smoke plume at a Middle East energy site with text about the US economy.
images.explanation: The image is a mismatched screenshot of an ABC News post about oil shocks, used to falsely illustrate missile interceptions.

images.scene_description: The image is a vertical graphic featuring a close-up of a missile nose cone against a grey sky. It is heavily overlaid with large Chinese text headlines, a 'NEWS UPDATE' banner, a map of the Indian Ocean, and a date stamp.
images.ocr_text: Diego Garcia Air Base 美媒：伊朗导弹袭击 3800公里外美英印度洋基地 资料画面 当地时间3月20日，据美国《华尔街日报》援引多位美国官员消息报道，伊朗向位于印度洋中部的美英联合军事基地迪戈加西亚岛发射了两枚中程弹道导弹。 NEWS UPDATE 美媒报道：伊朗导弹击中迪戈加西亚基地... Mar 21, 2026 (local)
images.v2_evidence: The image contains extensive editorial overlays, including large Chinese headline text, a 'NEWS UPDATE' banner, a map inset, and a date stamp, which are added on top of the base image.
images.explanation: The image is a heavily edited news graphic with overlays, consistent with the post's description of a social media screenshot.

image_analysis.global_notes: Image 1 is a severe mismatch (C1/C2) showing an oil refinery instead of missile interceptions. Image 2 is a heavily edited graphic (V2) consistent with the post's claim.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖文文字部分准确报道了伊朗向以色列和迪戈加西亚基地发射导弹的事实，但配图1存在严重误导，其声称展示夜间拦截画面，实际却是关于石油危机的ABC新闻截图，图文严重不符。
judge.reasoning_trace: Text claims are supported by evidence. Image 1 is a mismatch (ABC News tweet vs. claimed interception footage), triggering T3, V2, C1, C2. Image 2 is consistent. The combination of true text and misleading image leads to Mixture.
judge.core_claim: 以色列军方通报伊朗于3月21日晚发射弹道导弹袭击以色列，同时网传伊朗向迪戈加西亚基地发射导弹。
key_subclaims: 以色列军方通报侦测到伊朗发射弹道导弹并启动拦截。
以色列多地拉响防空警报，民众避险，南部有建筑受损和人员受伤。
伊朗向迪戈加西亚基地发射两枚中程弹道导弹，一枚被拦截一枚失效。
图1展示了以色列境内夜间防空拦截的画面。
图2展示了迪戈加西亚基地遭袭的相关画面。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 以色列军方通报侦测到伊朗发射弹道导弹并启动拦截。
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms IDF reported Iranian ballistic missiles and air defense activation.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 以色列多地拉响防空警报，民众避险，南部有建筑受损和人员受伤。
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms alarms, sheltering, and reports of damage/injuries.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 伊朗向迪戈加西亚基地发射两枚中程弹道导弹，一枚被拦截一枚失效。
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms reports of missiles fired at Diego Garcia with one intercepted and one failing.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图1展示了以色列境内夜间防空拦截的画面。
subclaim_findings.note: Image 1 is a screenshot of an ABC News tweet about oil shocks and shows a daytime photo of a smoking refinery, not night interception footage.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图2展示了迪戈加西亚基地遭袭的相关画面。
subclaim_findings.note: Image 2 is a news graphic explicitly discussing the Diego Garcia missile attack.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post's text accurately reports the core events of Iranian missile strikes on Israel and Diego Garcia (Supported). However, Image 1 is completely mismatched: the text claims it shows night interception, but it is actually a screenshot of an ABC News tweet about oil shocks showing a daytime refinery (Contradicted). This constitutes a significant misleading context (T3) and semantic/contextual inconsistency (C1, C2) due to the image-from-different-event pattern. Since the text is true but the visual evidence is misleading, and the false part (image mismatch) is substantial, it falls into Mixture.

image_findings.explanation: The post claims Image 1 shows night interception, but the image is a screenshot of an ABC News tweet about oil shocks featuring a daytime photo of a smoking refinery.
Image 2 is a news graphic with overlays discussing the Diego Garcia attack, consistent with the text.
